====Pokémon====
This listing is for Roxanne's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{anchor|Nosepass 4}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Roxanne
|pkmn=Nosepass
|gender=female
|type1=Rock
|img=Roxanne Nosepass Adventures.png
|epnum=PS190
|epname=Blowing Past Nosepass I
|desc={{p|Nosepass}} is Roxanne's first known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{adv|Sapphire}}'s [[Rono]] but lost. It helped battle {{p|Groudon}} and stopped it moving with {{m|Block}}, but was later knocked out by [[Courtney]]'s {{p|Ninetales}}, freeing Groudon.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Roxanne
|pkmn=Graveler
|type1=Rock
|type2=Ground
|img=Roxanne Graveler Adventures.png
|epnum=PS222
|epname=Short Shrift for Shiftry
|desc={{p|Graveler}} is Roxanne's second known Pokémon. It was first used to take Roxanne to the Gym Leaders' meeting in [[Fortree City]]. Later, it helped battle against {{p|Groudon}} by using its {{m|Rock Blast}} to prevent Groudon from moving.

Graveler's only known move is {{m|Rock Blast}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Roxanne
|pkmn=Cradily
|type1=Rock
|type2=Grass
|img=Roxanne Cradily Adventures.png
|epnum=PS248
|epname=The Beginning of the End with Kyogre & Groudon X
|desc={{p|Cradily}} is Roxanne's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Courtney]]'s {{p|Ninetales}} at the [[Cove Lily Motel]]. Using its {{m|Ingrain}}, Cradily was able to heal from any damage, but was defeated when Courtney took hostages, forcing Roxanne to give up.

Cradily's only known move is {{m|Ingrain}}, and its Ability is {{a|Insomnia}}{{tt|*|Cradily cannot legally have Insomnia in the games}}.}}
